rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks inside `annex agree {** ... **};`
Use `assume`, `guarantee`, `eq`, and `const` for component type annexes
Reference only identifiers visible in the current component scope
Use exact current-case names from the model index
generic_rules: Use visible identifiers from the model index
Avoid encoding AADL properties as AGREE expressions
Treat each annex agree block as scoped to its owning component declaration
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `assign output = expression;` for implementation-level bindings
Use `assume "label": expression;` and `guarantee "label": expression;` for component type annexes
Use `eq name : type = expression;` and `const name : type = value;` for component type annexes
anti_patterns: Do not invent ports/components or copy identifiers from examples
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions
Do not reference identifiers not visible in the current component scope
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables chunk 1
